prompt: Create a realistic studio portrait of a bald middle-aged man from the chest up, centered against a flat muted mustard yellow backdrop. The subject faces forward with a slight three-quarter turn, ears and the top of a shaved head visible, wearing a beige canvas work jacket over a black crewneck shirt and a burnt orange ribbed turtleneck. Cover the entire face with one large perfectly square opaque censor block centered over the head, extending from just below the scalp to below the chin; the square has a smooth skin-tone gradient from warm tan on the left to darker brown on the right, with no facial features visible. Use soft even studio lighting, natural fabric texture, shallow portrait framing, high realism, clean minimal composition, no text, no logo, no watermark.
